description: Create a blood bank booking request with blood group selection and automatic price calculation

fieldDescriptions.provider: REQUIRED - Blood bank ID from search results (_id field)
fieldDescriptions.bloodGroup: REQUIRED - One of: A+, A-, B+, B-, AB+, AB-, O+, O-
fieldDescriptions.unitsRequired: REQUIRED - Number of blood units needed (minimum 1)
fieldDescriptions.notes: OPTIONAL - Additional notes or reason for blood requirement
fieldDescriptions.location: OPTIONAL - Patient location or hospital address
fieldDescriptions.patientName: OPTIONAL - Patient name for the blood request
fieldDescriptions.hospital: OPTIONAL - Hospital name where blood is needed
fieldDescriptions.urgency: OPTIONAL - One of: normal, urgent, emergency

backendLogic.priceCalculation: Backend automatically calculates price based on: unitsRequired × pricePerUnit from blood bank's bloodStock
backendLogic.example: If blood bank has A+ at ₹500/unit and user requests 2 units, price = 2 × 500 = ₹1000

testScenarios.expectedPrice: 2 × pricePerUnit for A+ from blood bank

testScenarios.scenario: Book 1 unit of O- blood (universal donor)
testScenarios.expectedPrice: 1 × pricePerUnit for O- from blood bank
3 × pricePerUnit for B+ from blood bank

howToTest.step1: Get blood bank list with pricing
howToTest.step1_note: Copy the _id of a blood bank and check the pricePerUnit for your desired blood group
howToTest.step4_note: Login to blood bank vendor app to see the request

error1.fix: Add 'provider' field with blood bank ID

error2.fix: Add 'bloodGroup' field with valid blood group (A+, A-, B+, B-, AB+, AB-, O+, O-)

error3.message: Units required must be at least 1
error3.fix: Set unitsRequired to a positive number

error4.cause: Selected blood group has 0 units in stock
error4.fix: Choose a different blood group or blood bank

frontendIntegration.status: ✅ FIXED - Now sends correct field names
